name: cookbook
description: Mobile-first recipe manager with schema.org/Recipe JSON-LD support

scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev docs
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && node --test --test-concurrency=1 test/e2e-smoke.test.js test/e2e-week-cooking.test.js test/e2e-recipe-detail.test.js test/e2e-pantry-item-modal.test.js test/e2e-interaction-feedback.test.js test/e2e-ingredient-corrections.test.js
